name: PinMeTo
highlight_text: Category: Marketing & Search Technology for Multi-Location Brands
description:
What PinMeTo Does

PinMeTo optimizes for local ranking criteria and connects businesses to all the major maps and search services. The platform ensures your business info is consistent everywhere. It also optimizes your brand’s presence across the web, promoting your authoritativeness with accurate and valuable business information. 

You can also track the performance of your business listings, social media posts, and other branding assets to identify the most productive techniques.   

PinMeto keeps business information up to date on major search media, maps, and social media for multi-location organizations. In comparison, SingleInterface supports organizations in establishing a digital presence. They both have similar features, but Singeinterface is more comprehensive.
‍

Source: Crozdesk

Key Features

The main features of PinMeTo are: 

  • Listings management tool for local listings visibility
  • Track and respond to all reviews and ratings across all business listings and locations 
  • Enhance customer experience to improve online reputation 
  • Local social media management tools
  • Location page builder and local ads management

Benefits of PinMeTo

The PinMeTo software platform provides the following benefits:

  • Multi-location management: Audit brand info, detect inconsistencies, and bulk-update local business listings across multiple locations.
  • Improves customer online experience and responds to questions and reviews.
  • Integration: Integrates with search media, maps, and social media platforms, improving business reputation and local SEO rankings. 
  • Colaborative interface 
  • Customizable templates for reports, communications, social media posts, etc.

Pricing

PinMeto’s pricing comes in three tiers:

  • Listings
  • Conversations
  • Posts

A demo can be scheduled for each, and a customized price will be provided.

Pros 

✅ Multi-location management    

✅ User friendly

✅ Centralized control

Cons

🚫Manual updating requirements 

🚫Steep learning curve  


Evaluate the selection criteria we’ve discussed and consider which features will satisfy your business needs and budget. Then, you can review the list and match your requirements with one of these software platforms.

‍
summing_up_description:
Get Started with Synup 

At Synup, we have the know-how, software solutions, and passion to support customers on the journey to enhance their local business's online presence and elevate their turnover. 

Why Synup?  

  1. We take pride in our customers' success - with proven results & demonstrated case studies.
  2. We form aligned partnerships where our customers share their pain points, and our team partners with them to find permanent solutions.   
  3. Synup has industry-leading, innovative solutions to save time and improve business turnover. Our automated tools will do the tedious work while you focus on managing your business.
    ‍

‍

FAQs

  1. What is reputation management?

Reputation management influences stakeholder perceptions, public views, and conversations about a business and its brands. It includes monitoring and responding to perceptions and conversations and proactively taking action to boost reputation.

  1. What is brand intelligence? 

Brand intelligence is the art and science of monitoring the signals and signs that reflect customers perceptions of a specific brand. 

  1. What is the meaning of digital presence? 

Your digital presence refers to how your business appears to people online. It begs questions like ‘How easy is it for online users to find your business when searching on Google or other search engines? 

‍

You may have a website or social media page, but that does not necessarily mean you have a digital presence. 

‍

Your digital presence is strong when people search for your products or services, and your website or promotional channels appear high in the search results. 

‍
